groups.name: IT Support
groups.description: Handles IT provisioning/deprovisioning tasks (laptop, accounts, software access).

groups.name: Facilities
groups.description: Handles workstation setup/teardown, badge, parking, desk allocation.

groups.name: Security
groups.description: Handles physical/system access grant and revocation.

groups.name: HR Operations
groups.description: Raises and monitors lifecycle requests; owns the HR dashboard.
